entries.source: Ask for subject, level, time limit, and question types if missing.
entries.value: Kërko lëndën, nivelin, kufirin kohose, dhe llojet e pyetjeve nëse mungon.

entries.source: Ask for subjects, deadlines, resources, and pain points.
entries.value: Kërko lëndët, afatet, burimet, dhe pikat e vështira.

entries.source: Ask for subjects, time spent, wins, misses, and upcoming deadlines.
entries.value: Kërko lëndët, kohën e kaluar, sukseset, gabimet, dhe të ardhshme afatet.

entries.source: Ask for the data, context, and question being answered.
entries.value: Kërko të dhënat, kontekstin dhe pyetjen që po merr përgjigje.

entries.source: Ask for the diagram parts or subject, then generate a label list and practice round.
entries.value: Kërko the diagram parts ose lëndën, pastaj generate a label list dhe practice round.

entries.source: Ask for the habit, current obstacle, and easiest starting version.
entries.value: Kërko zakonin, pengesën aktuale dhe versionin më të lehtë të nisjes.

entries.source: Ask for the learning context and behaviors worth rewarding.
entries.value: Kërko kontekstin e të nxënit dhe sjelljet që ia vlen të shpërblehen.

entries.source: Ask for the note set, subject, and desired organization style.
entries.value: Kërko grupin e shënimeve, lëndën dhe stilin e dëshiruar të organizimit.

entries.source: Ask for the one highest-impact revision priority, then rewrite the paragraph yourself.
entries.value: Kërko përparësinë e vetme më me ndikim për rishikim, pastaj rishkruaje vetë paragrafin.

entries.source: Ask for the passage or title and the learner's goal.
entries.value: Kërko the passmoshën ose title dhe the learner's synimin.

entries.source: Ask for the prerequisite ideas, a plain-language model, one example, one practice task, and one way to test understanding.
entries.value: Kërko idetë paraprake, një model me gjuhë të thjeshtë, një shembull, një detyrë praktike dhe një mënyrë për të testuar kuptimin.

entries.source: Ask for the question, learner answer, and expected answer if any part is missing.
entries.value: Kërko pyetjen, përgjigjen e nxënësit dhe përgjigjen e pritshme nëse mungon ndonjë pjesë.

entries.source: Ask for the smallest explanation or next experiment.
entries.value: Kërko the smallest explanation ose next experiment.

entries.source: Ask for the smallest hint or a check on your attempted step.
entries.value: Kërko the smallest hint ose a check on your attempted step.

entries.source: Ask for the smallest useful hint
entries.value: Kërko sugjerimin më të vogël të dobishëm

entries.source: Ask for the source text, claim, author, date, and context if missing.
entries.value: Kërko tekstin burimor, pretendimin, autorin, datën dhe kontekstin nëse mungojnë.

entries.source: Ask for the study block length and suggest a break rhythm.
entries.value: Kërko gjatësinë e bllokut të studimit dhe sugjero një ritëm pushimesh.

entries.source: Ask for the task, target duration, and completion criteria.
entries.value: Kërko detyrën, kohëzgjatjen e synuar dhe kriteret e përfundimit.

entries.source: Ask for the text and desired length if missing.
entries.value: Kërko tekstin dhe gjatësinë e dëshiruar nëse mungojnë.

entries.source: Ask for the topic and which side the learner wants; take the opposite side.
entries.value: Kërko temën dhe anën që dëshiron nxënësi; merr anën e kundërt.

entries.source: Ask for the topic in plain language, then request one analogy, one example, and one common misconception.
entries.value: Kërko temën me gjuhë të thjeshtë, pastaj kërko një analogji, një shembull dhe një keqkuptim të zakonshëm.

entries.source: Ask for the topic, context, what they tried, and desired help.
entries.value: Kërko temën, kontekstin, çfarë kanë provuar dhe ndihmën e dëshiruar.

entries.source: Ask for the visible text, labels, and the learner's question if the image is not attached.
entries.value: Kërko tekstin e dukshëm, etiketat dhe pyetjen e nxënësit nëse imazhi nuk është bashkëngjitur.

entries.source: Ask for topic and purpose, then propose the central node and first branches.
entries.value: Kërko temën dhe qëllimin, pastaj propozo nyjën qendrore dhe degët e para.

entries.source: Ask for topic and scope, then propose a first map structure.
entries.value: Kërko temën dhe fushëveprimin, pastaj propozo a të parë strukturën e hartës.

entries.source: Ask for topic, age/level, and tone; then create a short story setup.
entries.value: Kërko temën, moshën/nivelin, dhe tonin; pastaj create a hyrjen e shkurtër të histoseisë.

entries.source: Ask for topic, duration, level, and scoring preference.
entries.value: Kërko temën, kohëzgjatjen, nivelin, dhe preferencën e vlerësimit.

entries.source: Ask for topic, level, and examiner style; then begin with a warm-up question.
entries.value: Kërko temën, nivelin, dhe stilin e pyetësit; pastaj fillo with a pyetje nxehjeje.

entries.source: Ask for topic, level, and preferred game vibe; then create the first quest.
entries.value: Kërko temën, nivelin dhe atmosferën e preferuar të lojës; pastaj krijo misionin e parë.

entries.source: Ask for topic, level, exam date, and source material if needed.
entries.value: Kërko temën, nivelin, exam date, dhe materialin burimosein if needed.

entries.source: Ask for topic, level, question types, and number of items.
entries.value: Kërko temën, nivelin, llojet e pyetjeve, dhe number of items.

entries.source: Ask group size, topic, time, and desired outcome.
entries.value: Pyet madhësinë e grupit, temën, time, dhe desired rezultatin.

entries.source: Ask instrument/level if relevant, then teach one small concept.
entries.value: Pyet instrument/nivelin if është e rëndësishme, pastaj teach one small concept.

entries.source: Ask interests, constraints, and curiosity level before recommending paths.
entries.value: Pyet interests, kufizimet, dhe curiosity nivelin para recommending paths.

entries.source: Ask me five Socratic questions about this topic. After each answer, tell me what assumption I used and what to test next.
entries.value: Më bëj pesë pyetje sokratike për këtë temë. Pas çdo përgjigjeje, më thuaj çfarë supozimi përdora dhe çfarë të testoj më pas.

entries.source: Ask me one check question
entries.value: Pyet me one check question

entries.source: Ask me questions about this poem
entries.value: Më bëj pyetje për këtë poezi

entries.source: Ask me thesis defense questions
entries.value: Më bëj pyetje për mbrojtjen e tezës

entries.source: Ask one focused diagnostic question quickly. Convert the learner's target into a mastery target internally, then start with a simple question that reveals their mental model.
entries.value: Bëj shpejt një pyetje diagnostikuese të fokusuar. Ktheje brenda sistemit synimin e nxënësit në synim zotërimi, pastaj fillo me një pyetje të thjeshtë që zbulon modelin e tij mendor.

entries.source: Ask one sharp goal question, infer sensible defaults, then create a compact learning map with a try-first activity.
entries.value: Pyet one sharp synimin question, infer sensible defaults, pastaj create a compact learning map with a try-të parë activity.

entries.source: Ask predictions, reveal consequences, adjust variables, and summarize principles.
entries.value: Pyet predictions, reveal consequences, adjust variables, dhe summarize principles.

entries.source: Ask questions, challenge ideas, and learn history through grounded conversations with public figures from the past.
entries.value: Bëj pyetje, sfido ide dhe mëso historinë përmes bisedave të bazuara me figura publike nga e kaluara.

entries.source: Ask Socratic Instruction to find the weak link.
entries.value: Kërkoji Socratic Instruction të gjejë lidhjen e dobët.

entries.source: Ask the AI to check that step.
entries.value: Kërkoji AI-së ta kontrollojë atë hap.

entries.source: Ask the AI to check your reasoning, not just the result.
entries.value: Kërkoji AI-së të kontrollojë arsyetimin tënd, jo vetëm rezultatin.

entries.source: Ask the AI to check your reasoning.
entries.value: Kërkoji AI-së të kontrollojë arsyetimin tënd.

entries.source: Ask the AI to label uncertainty.
entries.value: Kërkoji AI-së të etiketojë pasigurinë.

entries.source: Ask the historical mode to label what is documented, inferred, or simulated.
entries.value: Pyet the histoseical mode to label what is documented, inferred, ose simulated.

entries.source: Ask the learner to explain the topic in plain language first.
entries.value: Kërkoji nxënësit ta shpjegojë temën së pari me gjuhë të thjeshtë.

entries.source: Ask the learner to explain what changed after each hint.
entries.value: Kërkoji nxënësit të shpjegojë çfarë ndryshoi pas çdo sugjerimi.

entries.source: Ask the learner to state their current belief, then test it with a small example.
entries.value: Pyet the learner to state their current belief, pastaj test it with a small example.

entries.source: Ask the real question
entries.value: Bëj pyetjen e vërtetë

entries.source: Ask what a different side would claim.
entries.value: Pyet what a different side would claim.

entries.source: Ask what a different side, class, era, or source might say.
entries.value: Pyet what a different side, class, era, ose source might say.

entries.source: Ask what data or observations they have and what decision they need.
entries.value: Pyet what data ose observations they have dhe what decision they need.

entries.source: Ask what happened, what they felt, and what they want to improve.
entries.value: Pyet what happened, what they felt, dhe what they want to improve.

entries.source: Ask what must be remembered and what familiar place the learner wants to use.
entries.value: Pyet what must be remembered dhe what familiar vendin the learner wants to use.

entries.source: Ask what the learner wants to be quizzed on if the topic is missing.
entries.value: Pyet what the learner wants to be quizzed on if the temën is missing.

entries.source: Ask what the learner wants to represent, then propose a simple visual layout.
entries.value: Pyet what the learner wants to represent, pastaj propozo a simple visual layout.

entries.source: Ask what the resource is, audience, and what context they need.
entries.value: Pyet what the resource is, audiencën, dhe what context they need.

entries.source: Ask what they are doing and suggest a low-distraction sound preset.
entries.value: Pyet what they are doing dhe suggest a low-distraction sound preset.

entries.source: Ask what they have tried, then give a hint or worked miniature example.
entries.value: Pyet what they have tried, pastaj give a hint ose i punuar miniature example.

entries.source: Ask your first question and move straight into practice.
entries.value: Pyet your të parë question dhe move straight into practice.

entries.source: Ask, evaluate, improve with structure, and retry.
entries.value: Ask, evaluate, improve me structure, dhe retry.

entries.source: Assessment
entries.value: Assessment

entries.source: Assign XP, levels, quests, and reflection checkpoints.
entries.value: Assign XP, levels, quests, dhe reflection checkpika.

entries.source: At Inspir, our mission is to democratize learning by making it accessible, engaging, and enjoyable for all. We believe that everyone has the right to quality education, regardless of their background or circumstances. Our platform is designed to provide students with the tools and resources they need to succeed, while also fostering a love of learning. We strive to create a community that is inclusive, supportive, and empowering, where students can connect with each other and with educators from around the world. By making learning fun and accessible, we aim to inspir a generation of lifelong learners who are equipped to tackle the challenges of the future.
entries.value: At Inspir, our mission is to democratize mësoing by making it accessible, engaging, dhe enjoyable për all. We believe that everyone has the right to quality education, regardless of their background ose circumstances. Our platpërm is designed to provide studentë me the mjets dhe resources they need to succeed, while also fostering a love of mësoing. We strive to krijo a community that is inclusive, mbështetës, dhe empowering, where studentë can lidh me each other dhe me edukatoseë nga around the botë. By making mësoing fun dhe accessible, we aim to inspir a generation of lifelong nxënës who are equipped to tackle the challenges of the future.

entries.source: CalOPPA is the first state law in the nation to require commercial websites and online services to post a privacy policy. The law’s reach stretches well beyond California to require a person or company in the United States (and conceivable the world) that operates websites collecting personally identifiable information from California consumers to post a conspicuous privacy policy on its website stating exactly the information being collected and those individuals with whom it is being shared, and to comply with this policy.
entries.value: CalOPPA is the së pari state law in the nation to require commercial websites dhe online services to post a privacy policy. The law’s reach stretches well beyond Kalifornia to require a person ose company in the United States (dhe conceivable the botë) that operates websites collecting personally identifiable informacion nga Kalifornia consumers to post a conspicuous privacy policy on its website stating exactly the informacion being collected dhe those individuals me whom it is being shared, dhe to comply me this policy.

entries.source: Career Explorer
entries.value: Eksploruesi i karrierës

entries.source: career explorer AI
entries.value: AI për career exploseer

entries.source: Career Explorer AI Learning Mode is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Explore careers through interests, skills, day-in-the-life examples, and next steps.
entries.value: Mënyra e të nxënit me AI Eksploruesi i Karrierës është një mënyrë e fokusuar për të përdorur AI-në për të mësuar, jo për të mbledhur përgjigje pasivisht. Kjo mënyrë ndërtohet rreth një detyre të caktuar: Eksploro karrierat përmes interesave, aftësive, shembujve nga një ditë pune dhe hapave të ardhshëm.

entries.source: Case Study Simulator AI Learning Mode is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Enter a realistic case, make decisions, see consequences, and learn the principle behind each choice.
entries.value: Mënyra e të nxënit me AI Simulatori i Studimit të Rastit është një mënyrë e fokusuar për të përdorur AI-në për të mësuar, jo për të mbledhur përgjigje pasivisht. Kjo mënyrë ndërtohet rreth një detyre të caktuar: Hyr në një rast realist, merr vendime, shih pasojat dhe mëso parimin pas çdo zgjedhjeje.
